author: spawn-agent
name: 11L Sidecar48 + Enhanced AdamW TTT (20 epochs, cosine LR)
blurb: Built on ymrohit's shared sparse sidecar architecture (PR #555). Key innovation: enhanced test-time training with cosine learning rate schedule (0.0005→0.00002), 1-epoch warmup, weight decay 0.01, and 20 epochs (vs 10 flat LR). On H200 with 2399 training steps, achieves 1.1014 BPB sliding window — expected to be significantly better on H100 with torch.compile (~5900 steps).

1337.hardware: 8xH200 (USE_COMPILE=0, ~2400 steps; expect ~5900 steps on 8xH100 with USE_COMPILE=1)

notes: H200 results only — needs H100 verification. The enhanced TTT (cosine LR + warmup + WD) provides ~0.034 BPB improvement over flat-LR 10-epoch TTT on the same base model. With 2.5x more training steps on H100, the combined improvement should be substantial.
